title: Senior PEB Structural Designer
description: We are seeking an experienced structural designer specializing in Tekla Structures and MBS software to design complex Pre-Engineered Buildings, calculate loads, and prepare erection schemes.
requirements: Expertise in Tekla Structures, MBS, STAAD.Pro
In-depth knowledge of IS and AISC codes for steel designs
Experience executing clear spans greater than 50 meters

title: BIM Software Developer
description: Develop and maintain custom Tekla APIs, Revit plugins, and internal structural optimization software. Standardize automation workflows for structural detailing.
requirements: B.Tech in Computer Science / Civil Engineering
Proficient in C#, .NET, and Autodesk/Tekla API integration
Familiarity with computational design tools (Grasshopper, Dynamo)
Strong debugging and software design patterns

title: Industrial Marketing Specialist
description: Drive lead generation campaigns, coordinate B2B corporate events, and manage branding materials for high-value industrial warehouse and factory tenders.
requirements: MBA in Marketing or relevant business degree
Experience in B2B construction/industrial equipment marketing
Skilled in SEO, LinkedIn Ads, and CRM tools
Excellent communication and pitch preparation skills

title: Talent Acquisition Partner
description: Lead the recruitment cycle for engineering, project site execution, and structural design teams, cultivating a high-performance talent pipeline.
requirements: Proven recruiting experience in heavy engineering or construction sector
Strong candidate evaluation and onboarding capabilities
